gpt55_review_summary: Dirac the 4th reviewed latest HEAD and approved. Initial P3 noted generated identifiers accepted Python keywords or explicit empty strings; fixed by rejecting keywords and explicit empty module/class names, added tests, and delta re-review approved with no blocking findings.
verification: python -m compileall -q src tests && git diff --check -> passed
what_changed: Added a fail-closed native probe delegate scaffold generator and CLI for backend-specific vLLM/SGLang adapter packages.
Documented the scaffold as adapter-package starter code, not release evidence.
Added tests for generated contract declarations, backend guards, overwrite behavior, identifier validation, CLI execution, public module discovery, and script metadata.
why: The package already exposes a fail-closed native probe boundary; adapter authors need a reproducible starting module that declares the exact Cachet contracts without pretending to provide a real native block-manager implementation.
